case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. JENNIFER N BREEN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-27-2012 AT 2:00PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO THE REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
